UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOYAL, MAURICE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE TESTAMENTARY TRUST OF TOMMIE SLAY RICHARDSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, FAYE A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1854 GOLDEN GATE AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
